steps.title: Match coefficients
steps.content: The left side is $2x^2 + ax$ and the right side is $2x^2 + 7x$. The $x^2$ coefficients already match. Matching the $x$ coefficients: $a = 7$.

steps.title: Identify the correct choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — '2': $a = 2$ would give $2x^2 + 2x$, but $x(2x+7) = 2x^2 + 7x$. ✗
  • Choice B — '3': $a = 3$ would give $2x^2 + 3x$. Does not match $2x^2 + 7x$. ✗
  • Choice C — '4': $a = 4$ would give $2x^2 + 4x$. Does not match $2x^2 + 7x$. ✗
  • Choice D — '7': $a = 7$ gives $2x^2 + 7x = x(2x + 7)$. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
